case_title: MONICA POTTER VS. SCOTT KENNETH POTTER

docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-14-2017 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. PLAINTIFF MONICA POTTER APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/18/17 IS CONTINUED TO 11/20/17 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRE-TRIAL AND DISCOVERY DEADLINES SHALL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Plaintiff Monica Potter, Esq., a/k/a Monica Mazzei, was present in pro per, placed under oath and tesitified.
No appearance by defendant Scott Kenneth Potter.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial, setting trial for Monday, September 18, 2017, was filed & served on March 22, 2017. Order granting plaintiff's motion to continue trial to today, November 20, 2017, was filed on September 14, 2017.

Exhibit 1: MSA dated September 30, 2016...............................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Plaintiff's complaint dated October 21, 2016...............................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Plaintiff's request for production of documents............................ID/EVID
Exhibit 4: Order of the Court dated March 21, 2017....................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 5: Restraining Order After Hearing dated May 3, 2017..........................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Monica Potter, a/k/a Monica Mazzei, and against defendant Scott Kenneth Potter, follows:

Damages - $222,263.00.
Pre-Judgment Interest - $27,782.30.
Costs - $570.00.
Total - $250,615.30.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of Exhibits 1 through 5.

Plaintiff In Pro Per shall prepare the Proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2017 Continued To Nov-20-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-14-2017 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2017 Set For Trial On Sep-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Mar-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:PLAINTIFF MONICA POTTER TEL NO. 415-733-3930 APPEARING PRO PER;
DEFENDANT SCOTT POTTER TEL NO. 415-572-5127 APPEARING PRO PER.

RULING- A R G U E D, PLAINTIFF MONICA POTTER's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents, Set One is unopposed and granted. Plaintiff shall serve a copy of this Order with Notice of Entry. The Defendant shall provide a verified code compliant response, without objections, within twenty-five days of said service. Court to prepare Order. Judge Pro tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.
